faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Kearny home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool clothing or upholstery, silky tubes or cases in closets, cream-colored larvae on fabrics, adult moths flying near wardrobes, and damaged carpets or tapestries. You may also notice webbing in the corners of closets or drawers in your Kearny home.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my fabrics and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, our clothes moth treatments are specifically designed to eliminate moths while being safe for your valuable fabrics, family members, and pets. We use targeted applications that focus on moth larvae and eggs without damaging your clothing, and all products are EPA-approved for residential use.
